task_completion.description: Open and read the specification sheet on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of the exhaust port gasket specification sheet from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Draw the outer boundary rectangle in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangle drawn in SolveSpace, dimensioned to 150mm wide and 120mm tall.

task_completion.description: Draw the central exhaust port bore with the specified egg shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An egg-shaped closed profile in the center of the rectangle, consisting of a semicircular bottom arc, a flat horizontal top line, and two smaller fillet arcs connecting them.
Four small circles drawn symmetrically around the center, inside the outer boundary.

task_completion.description: Fully constrain the sketch to 0 degrees of freedom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace property browser (usually top left) displays '0 DOF' or 'ok' in green, indicating no remaining degrees of freedom.

task_completion.description: Extrude the fully constrained sketch to the specified material thickness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch is converted into a 3D solid model with a visible thickness (2mm). An 'extrude' group may be visible in the property browser.

task_completion.description: Save the model as .slvs and export the sketch as .dxf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File save/export dialogs in SolveSpace, or terminal commands showing the creation of 'exhaust_gasket.slvs' and 'exhaust_gasket.dxf' in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SolveSpace graphical interface, including drawing tools, constraints, and property browser.

integrity.description: The agent actively drew and constrained the sketch rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the progressive construction of the sketch, adding lines, arcs, and dimensions step-by-step.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the CAD software by directly writing to the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Outputs are generated via SolveSpace's 'Save' and 'Export' functions, not by echo/cat commands or text editors writing to .slvs/.dxf files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Outer boundary: 150mm x 120mm rectangle. Central bore: Egg-shaped, bottom arc R=20mm, top flat line 30mm long, two fillet arcs R=8mm. Bolt holes: 4 holes, 9mm diameter, located at (+/-50, +/-40) from center. Constraints: Sketch must be fully constrained (0 DOF). Extrusion: 2mm thickness. Output files: exhaust_gasket.slvs and exhaust_gasket.dxf in /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/.
